settings.welcome: Family-run carnicería in Stockton — hand-cut beef, pork, chicken, seafood and house-made chorizo. Cut fresh, wrapped to order.
settings.welcomeEs: Carnicería familiar en Stockton — res, cerdo, pollo, mariscos y chorizo hecho en casa. Cortado al momento, envuelto a tu gusto.

giveaway.blurb: ENTER OUR GIVEAWAY FOR A CHANCE TO WIN !
giveaway.blurbEs: PARTICIPA EN NUESTRO SORTEO PARA TENER LA OPORTUNIDAD DE GANAR !

products.name: Ribeye Steak
products.desc: Richly marbled, tender, full of flavor. Jesse’s go-to for a special-occasion steak.
products.descEs: Muy marmoleado, suave y lleno de sabor. El favorito de Jesse para una ocasión especial.

products.name: Tomahawk
products.desc: A show-stopping bone-in ribeye. Thick and built for the grill.
products.descEs: Un ribeye con hueso espectacular. Grueso y hecho para el asador.

products.name: New York Strip
products.desc: Firm, beefy and clean-cutting. A steakhouse classic.
products.descEs: Firme, sabroso y de corte limpio. Un clásico de asador.

products.name: T-Bone Steak
products.desc: Strip and tenderloin in one cut — best of both.
products.descEs: New York y filete en un solo corte — lo mejor de ambos.

products.name: Arrachera
products.desc: Marinated skirt steak — the heart of great tacos and asada.
products.descEs: Arrachera marinada — el alma de los mejores tacos y la carne asada.

products.name: Carne Asada
products.desc: Thin-sliced marinated beef, ready for the grill. Taco night essential.
products.descEs: Res marinada en rebanadas finas, lista para asar. Esencial para la noche de tacos.

products.name: Diezmillo
products.desc: Chuck cut, great sliced thin for tacos or fajitas.
products.descEs: Corte de aguja, ideal en rebanadas finas para tacos o fajitas.

products.name: Brisket
products.desc: Whole packer brisket — low and slow perfection.
products.descEs: Pecho entero — perfección a fuego lento.

products.name: Short Ribs
products.desc: Meaty, marbled, incredible smoked or braised.
products.descEs: Costilla marmoleada, increíble ahumada o guisada.

products.name: Ground Beef 80/20
products.desc: Fresh-ground daily. Juicy 80/20 blend for burgers and more.
products.descEs: Molida fresca cada día. Mezcla jugosa 80/20 para hamburguesas y más.

products.name: Burger Patties
products.desc: Hand-pressed quarter-pounders, ready for the grill.
products.descEs: Hamburguesas prensadas a mano, listas para el asador.

products.name: Pork Chops
products.desc: Center-cut, thick and juicy.
products.descEs: Chuletas de centro, gruesas y jugosas.

products.name: Al Pastor
products.desc: Marinated adobo pork, thin-sliced for tacos al pastor.
products.descEs: Cerdo adobado marinado, en rebanadas finas para tacos al pastor.

products.name: Carnitas Cut
products.desc: Pork shoulder cut for slow-cooked carnitas.
products.descEs: Espaldilla de cerdo para carnitas a fuego lento.

products.name: Baby Back Ribs
products.desc: Tender racks that fall off the bone.
products.descEs: Costillitas suaves que se desprenden del hueso.

products.name: Chicharrón
products.desc: Skin-on pork belly for crispy chicharrón.
products.descEs: Panza de cerdo con piel para chicharrón crujiente.

products.name: Chicken Breast
products.desc: Boneless, skinless, trimmed clean.
products.descEs: Pechuga sin hueso ni piel, bien limpia.

products.name: Whole Chicken
products.desc: Farm-fresh whole bird, great roasted.
products.descEs: Pollo entero fresco, ideal para rostizar.

products.name: Marinated Chicken
products.desc: House al-pastor style marinade. Grill-ready.
products.descEs: Pollo al pastor de la casa. Listo para asar.

products.name: Chicken Wings
products.desc: Party-size fresh wings.
products.descEs: Alitas frescas tamaño fiesta.

products.name: Shrimp
products.desc: Large, fresh, deveined shrimp.
products.descEs: Camarón grande, fresco y limpio.

products.name: Tilapia Fillet
products.desc: Clean, mild fillets ready to cook.
products.descEs: Filetes suaves y limpios, listos para cocinar.

products.name: Red Snapper
products.desc: Whole snapper — perfect for frying.
products.descEs: Huachinango entero — perfecto para freír.

products.name: Chorizo
products.desc: House-made Mexican chorizo. A store favorite.
products.descEs: Chorizo mexicano hecho en casa. Favorito de la tienda.

products.name: Longaniza
products.desc: Seasoned longaniza links.
products.descEs: Longaniza sazonada en tiras.

products.name: Beef Franks
products.desc: All-beef franks for the grill.
products.descEs: Salchichas de res para el asador.
